hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r 'def s: if type=="array" then join(" ") else tostring end; (.tool_input.command // .tool_input.cmd // .tool_input.script // "") | s' 2>/dev/null); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm[[:space:]]+-rf|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+--force|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|DROP[[:space:]]+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1 && npm run test 2>&1
